title: The equity rally and the perilous promises of Artificial Intelligence
section_path: The equity rally and the perilous promises of Artificial Intelligence
section_path_text: The equity rally and the perilous promises of Artificial Intelligence
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know this week:
The macroeconomy is no longer driving the equity market. After last week's US CPI announcement, rate cut expectations are now back near October levels, and much closer to reality. While bond markets adjusted, equity markets are still rallying, mostly on the back of technology.
